hero.name: Patrikas
hero.description: I build full-stack web products — from architecture to deployment. SaaS platforms, content-driven sites, internal tools — available for freelance projects I can own end-to-end.

about.label: About me
about.title: A bit about myself
about.paragraph1: I'm a full-stack developer with 4+ years of experience. I've worked in product companies on large-scale web infrastructure and built freelance projects from scratch — making architecture decisions, integrating payment systems and third-party services, and shipping to production.
about.paragraph2: I take projects I can own end-to-end. That means making the right technical calls early, writing code that doesn't become a problem later, and keeping clients informed throughout.
about.bring1Desc: From architecture decisions to production deployment. I handle every technical layer of the product.
about.bring2Desc: Payment systems, auth flows, third-party integrations — I've shipped these before.
about.bring3Desc: You're in the loop without having to chase me for updates.
about.bring4Desc: Clean structure and maintainable patterns, not quick-fix debt you'll regret in 6 months.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Where I've worked
experience.festo_b2: Microfrontend module development in a multi-team product
experience.festo_b3: Onboarding and mentoring new frontend developers
experience.web_b2: Internal tool creation and responsive design

services.label: Services
services.title: What I can build
services.card1Desc: End-to-end web application development — from database and API design to a polished, performant frontend. Built to scale.
services.card2Desc: Full SaaS products built from the ground up — from user accounts and payments to a complete dashboard, ready to ship.
services.card3Desc: Custom integrations that connect your business tools — Slack, Jira, and external services — into automated workflows, scheduled jobs, and internal reporting systems.
services.card4Desc: Mobile applications for iOS and Android — built to extend your product or service beyond the browser to your users' phones.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Send me a message — I reply within 24 hours.
contact.contactIntro: Available for freelance projects — web products, SaaS platforms, and custom integrations. I reply to all messages within 24 hours.
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

name.min: Name must be at least 2 characters
name.max: Name must be less than 100 characters

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

message.min: Message must be at least 10 characters
message.max: Message must be less than 5000 characters
